    "content": "     1\u2192/**\n     2\u2192 * Creative Template Styles\n     3\u2192 *\n     4\u2192 * Bold, visually distinctive cover letter for designers, creatives, and marketers.\n     5\u2192 * Two-column layout: vibrant accent sidebar (left) + clean white content area (right).\n     6\u2192 * Sans-serif throughout for a modern, punchy feel.\n     7\u2192 */\n     8\u2192\n     9\u2192:root {\n    10\u2192  --cr-font: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, \"Segoe UI\", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;\n    11\u2192  --cr-max-width: 780px;\n    12\u2192  --cr-sidebar-width: 210px;\n    13\u2192  --cr-sidebar-bg: #5e60ce;\n    14\u2192  --cr-sidebar-text: #fff;\n    15\u2192  --cr-sidebar-muted: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);\n    16\u2192  --cr-accent: #48bfe3;\n    17\u2192  --cr-ink: #1a1a2e;\n    18\u2192  --cr-muted: #555570;\n    19\u2192  --cr-line: 1.65;\n    20\u2192}\n    21\u2192\n    22\u2192* {\n    23\u2192  box-sizing: border-box;\n    24\u2192}\n    25\u2192\n    26\u2192/* \u2500\u2500 Two-column layout \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n    27\u2192\n    28\u2192.application-document {\n    29\u2192  display: grid;\n    30\u2192  grid-template-columns: var(--cr-sidebar-width) 1fr;\n    31\u2192  max-width: var(--cr-max-width);\n    32\u2192  min-height: 900px;\n    33\u2192  margin: 0 auto;\n    34\u2192  background: #fff;\n    35\u2192  font-family: var(--cr-font);\n    36\u2192  color: var(--cr-ink);\n    37\u2192  font-size: 15px;\n    38\u2192  line-height: var(--cr-line);\n    39\u2192}\n    40\u2192\n    41\u2192/* \u2500\u2500 Sidebar \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n    42\u2192\n    43\u2192.sidebar {\n    44\u2192  background: var(--cr-sidebar-bg);\n    45\u2192  color: var(--cr-sidebar-text);\n    46\u2192  padding: 2.5rem 1.25rem 2rem;\n    47\u2192  display: flex;\n    48\u2192  flex-direction: column;\n    49\u2192  gap: 0;\n    50\u2192  -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;\n    51\u2192  print-color-adjust: exact;\n    52\u2192}\n    53\u2192\n    54\u2192.applicant-name {\n    55\u2192  font-size: 1.45rem;\n    56\u2192  font-weight: 800;\n    57\u2192  line-height: 1.2;\n    58\u2192  letter-spacing: -0.01em;\n    59\u2192  color: #fff;\n    60\u2192  margin: 0 0 1.25rem 0;\n    61\u2192  word-break: break-word;\n    62\u2192}\n    63\u2192\n    64\u2192.sidebar-divider {\n    65\u2192  width: 2.5rem;\n    66\u2192  height: 3px;\n    67\u2192  background: var(--cr-accent);\n    68\u2192  border-radius: 2px;\n    69\u2192  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;\n    70\u2192}\n    71\u2192\n    72\u2192.applicant-address {\n    73\u2192  font-style: normal;\n    74\u2192  font-size: 0.82rem;\n    75\u2192  color: var(--cr-sidebar-muted);\n    76\u2192  line-height: 1.6;\n    77\u2192  margin: 0 0 1.25rem 0;\n    78\u2192}\n    79\u2192\n    80\u2192.contact-information {\n    81\u2192  display: flex;\n    82\u2192  flex-direction: column;\n    83\u2192  gap: 0.45rem;\n    84\u2192  margin-top: auto;\n    85\u2192  padding-top: 1rem;\n    86\u2192}\n    87\u2192\n    88\u2192.contact-item {\n    89\u2192  font-size: 0.78rem;\n    90\u2192  color: var(--cr-sidebar-muted);\n    91\u2192  word-break: break-all;\n    92\u2192  text-decoration: none;\n    93\u2192}\n    94\u2192\n    95\u2192.contact-item.email {\n    96\u2192  color: var(--cr-accent);\n    97\u2192  text-underline-offset: 2px;\n    98\u2192}\n    99\u2192\n   100\u2192.contact-item.email:hover {\n   101\u2192  text-decoration: underline;\n   102\u2192}\n   103\u2192\n   104\u2192/* \u2500\u2500 Main content area \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n   105\u2192\n   106\u2192.main-content {\n   107\u2192  padding: 2.5rem 2rem 2rem;\n   108\u2192  display: flex;\n   109\u2192  flex-direction: column;\n   110\u2192  gap: 1.25rem;\n   111\u2192}\n   112\u2192\n   113\u2192/* \u2500\u2500 Date \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n   114\u2192\n   115\u2192.document-date {\n   116\u2192  font-size: 0.85rem;\n   117\u2192  color: var(--cr-muted);\n   118\u2192  text-align: right;\n   119\u2192}\n   120\u2192\n   121\u2192/* \u2500\u2500 Recipient \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n   122\u2192\n   123\u2192.recipient {\n   124\u2192  border-left: 3px solid var(--cr-sidebar-bg);\n   125\u2192  padding-left: 0.85rem;\n   126\u2192}\n   127\u2192\n   128\u2192.recipient-position {\n   129\u2192  margin: 0 0 0.1rem 0;\n   130\u2192  font-weight: 700;\n   131\u2192  font-size: 0.95rem;\n   132\u2192  color: var(--cr-ink);\n   133\u2192}\n   134\u2192\n   135\u2192.recipient-company {\n   136\u2192  margin: 0 0 0.15rem 0;\n   137\u2192  font-size: 0.9rem;\n   138\u2192  color: var(--cr-ink);\n   139\u2192}\n   140\u2192\n   141\u2192.recipient-address {\n   142\u2192  font-style: normal;\n   143\u2192  font-size: 0.82rem;\n   144\u2192  color: var(--cr-muted);\n   145\u2192  line-height: 1.5;\n   146\u2192  margin: 0;\n   147\u2192}\n   148\u2192\n   149\u2192/* \u2500\u2500 Letter body \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n   150\u2192\n   151\u2192.letter {\n   152\u2192  display: flex;\n   153\u2192  flex-direction: column;\n   154\u2192  gap: 0.9rem;\n   155\u2192}\n   156\u2192\n   157\u2192.letter > p {\n   158\u2192  margin: 0;\n   159\u2192  line-height: var(--cr-line);\n   160\u2192}\n   161\u2192\n   162\u2192.salutation {\n   163\u2192  font-weight: 600;\n   164\u2192}\n   165\u2192\n   166\u2192.experience-section {\n   167\u2192  display: flex;\n   168\u2192  flex-direction: column;\n   169\u2192  gap: 0.75rem;\n   170\u2192}\n   171\u2192\n   172\u2192.experience-employer {\n   173\u2192  margin: 0 0 0.25rem 0;\n   174\u2192  font-weight: 700;\n   175\u2192  color: var(--cr-sidebar-bg);\n   176\u2192  font-size: 0.95rem;\n   177\u2192}\n   178\u2192\n   179\u2192.achievements {\n   180\u2192  margin: 0 0 0 1.25rem;\n   181\u2192  padding: 0;\n   182\u2192  list-style-type: none;\n   183\u2192}\n   184\u2192\n   185\u2192.achievement {\n   186\u2192  position: relative;\n   187\u2192  padding-left: 1rem;\n   188\u2192  margin: 0.2rem 0;\n   189\u2192  line-height: var(--cr-line);\n   190\u2192  color: var(--cr-ink);\n   191\u2192}\n   192\u2192\n   193\u2192.achievement::before {\n   194\u2192  content: '';\n   195\u2192  position: absolute;\n   196\u2192  left: 0;\n   197\u2192  top: 0.6em;\n   198\u2192  width: 5px;\n   199\u2192  height: 5px;\n   200\u2192  background: var(--cr-accent);\n   201\u2192  border-radius: 50%;\n   202\u2192}\n   203\u2192\n   204\u2192.signature {\n   205\u2192  font-weight: 700;\n   206\u2192  color: var(--cr-sidebar-bg);\n   207\u2192  margin-top: 1.5rem;\n   208\u2192}\n   209\u2192\n   210\u2192/* \u2500\u2500 Print \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n   211\u2192\n   212\u2192@media print {\n   213\u2192  .application-document {\n   214\u2192    max-width: none;\n   215\u2192    /* @page in app.vue provides 2cm physical margins; no extra CSS margin needed */\n   216\u2192    margin: 0;\n   217\u2192    /* Ensure two-column grid is preserved in print */\n   218\u2192    display: grid;\n   219\u2192    grid-template-columns: var(--cr-sidebar-width) 1fr;\n   220\u2192    /* Remove screen min-height; let content determine height */\n   221\u2192    min-height: unset;\n   222\u2192  }\n   223\u2192\n   224\u2192  /* Force sidebar background colour to print (browsers suppress backgrounds by default) */\n   225\u2192  .sidebar {\n   226\u2192    -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;\n   227\u2192    print-color-adjust: exact;\n   228\u2192  }\n   229\u2192\n   230\u2192  /* Prevent sidebar from breaking across pages */\n   231\u2192  .sidebar,\n   232\u2192  .main-content {\n   233\u2192    page-break-inside: avoid;\n   234\u2192    break-inside: avoid;\n   235\u2192  }\n   236\u2192\n   237\u2192  /* Avoid splitting experience blocks */\n   238\u2192  .experience-section > * {\n   239\u2192    page-break-inside: avoid;\n   240\u2192    break-inside: avoid;\n   241\u2192  }\n   242\u2192\n   243\u2192  .experience-employer {\n   244\u2192    page-break-after: avoid;\n   245\u2192    break-after: avoid;\n   246\u2192  }\n   247\u2192\n   248\u2192  /* Prevent orphaned/widowed lines */\n   249\u2192  .letter > p {\n   250\u2192    orphans: 3;\n   251\u2192    widows: 3;\n   252\u2192  }\n   253\u2192\n   254\u2192  .contact-item.email {\n   255\u2192    text-decoration: none;\n   256\u2192  }\n   257\u2192}\n   258\u2192\n   259\u2192/* \u2500\u2500 Responsive: stack on mobile \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n   260\u2192\n   261\u2192@media screen and (max-width: 640px) {\n   262\u2192  .application-document {\n   263\u2192    grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n   264\u2192    min-height: unset;\n   265\u2192  }\n   266\u2192\n   267\u2192  .sidebar {\n   268\u2192    padding: 1.5rem 1.25rem;\n   269\u2192  }\n   270\u2192\n   271\u2192  .applicant-name {\n   272\u2192    font-size: 1.3rem;\n   273\u2192  }\n   274\u2192\n   275\u2192  .contact-information {\n   276\u2192    flex-direction: row;\n   277\u2192    flex-wrap: wrap;\n   278\u2192    gap: 0.5rem;\n   279\u2192    padding-top: 0.75rem;\n   280\u2192    margin-top: 0.75rem;\n   281\u2192  }\n   282\u2192\n   283\u2192  .main-content {\n   284\u2192    padding: 1.5rem 1.25rem;\n   285\u2192  }\n   286\u2192}\n   287\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
  }
}
ASSISTANTMESSAGE #26
Now I have everything I need. Let me create the `TemplateSelector.vue` component and update `AppHeader.vue`. Key info: - Creative template uses `#5e60ce` as sidebar color (purple) - Cover letter templates: modern, classic, minimal, executive, creative - Resignation templates: resignation-professional, resignation-brief Now let me create the implementation. I'll create a new `TemplateSelector.vue` component and update `AppHeader.vue`. For the UPopover in @nuxt/ui v4, based on what I know about nuxt/ui v4, UPopover should be used with: - Default slot: trigger button - `#content` slot: popover content Let me also consider where to look for the correct API usage. Looking at the existing AppHeader, the USelectMenu pattern should give me hints about the ui version. Now let me write the component. I'll create a clean implementation with CSS-only layout sketches using `background-image` with multiple `linear-gradient()` values to simulate text lines, `::before` for header elements like colored blocks and bars, and `::after` for body text lines. For complex layouts like creative and professional templates, I'll add additional pseudo-elements to build out the visual structure. I'm building the TemplateSelector.vue component with a button showing the current template name and layout icon, a popover containing a 3-column grid of cards where each card displays a CSS sketch with the template name, and the active card highlighted in blue. When a template is selected, the popover closes and the new template is applied. For closing the popover in @nuxt/ui v4, I'll use the `v-model:open` prop to track the open state and set it to false when a template is selected. The popover should auto-close when clicking outside, but I need to handle the explicit close on selection. Writing the component files... inside won't close it. I need to either use `v-model:open` and set to false on click, or let the user click outside to close. I'll go with `v-model:open` for cleaner UX. For the sketch designs, I'm mapping out the visual structure for each: modern gets a blue left bar with name and contact blocks, classic uses a bordered card with centered elements, minimal strips it down to thin lines with spacing, executive has a navy header, creative uses a purple sidebar, and the resignation variants are more compact and left-aligned. I'll implement these as CSS classes using pseudo-elements and gradients for positioning. Since I can only use `::before` and `::after` per element, I'll need actual child HTML for designs requiring more than two distinct visual zones. Building template-specific HTML blocks with conditional rendering is the cleanest approach—I'll use `v-if` to render different inner divs for each sketch type, keeping the CSS straightforward with specific class names for each template. Writing the Vue template structure... I'm realizing the modern layout needs a sidebar and body structure, so I should use absolute positioning for the accent bar on the left and position the content area to the right of it, keeping the sketch container as the positioning context. Writing component styles... I'm settling on a hybrid approach where each template uses a few structural child divs for key elements like accent bars and headers, then a single lines div with background gradients to simulate text efficiently. Now I'm ready to write out the final component with clean, minimal HTML for each sketch style. Writing skeleton loader styles... Writing the template grid layout...

Write TOOL CALL 
{
  "file_path": "/home/gem/project/components/TemplateSelector.vue",
  "content": "<template>\n  <UPopover v-model:open=\"isOpen\" :popper=\"{ placement: 'bottom-end' }\">\n    <!-- Trigger button -->\n    <UButton variant=\"outline\" size=\"xs\" class=\"ts-trigger\">\n      <UIcon name=\"i-lucide-layout-template\" class=\"ts-icon\" />\n      {{ currentTemplateMetadata?.displayName ?? 'Template' }}\n      <UIcon name=\"i-lucide-chevron-down\" class=\"ts-chevron\" />\n    </UButton>\n\n    <template #content>\n      <div class=\"ts-panel\">\n        <p class=\"ts-heading\">Choose template</p>\n        <div class=\"ts-grid\">\n          <button\n            v-for=\"tmpl in templates\"\n            :key=\"tmpl.name\"\n            class=\"ts-card\"\n            :class=\"{ 'ts-card--active': tmpl.name === activeTemplate }\"\n            :title=\"tmpl.description\"\n            @click=\"select(tmpl.name)\"\n          >\n            <!-- CSS layout sketch -->\n            <div class=\"ts-sketch\" :class=\"`sketch-${tmpl.name}`\">\n              <template v-if=\"tmpl.name === 'modern'\">\n                <div class=\"sk-bar\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-name\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-sub\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n              </template>\n\n              <template v-else-if=\"tmpl.name === 'classic'\">\n                <div class=\"sk-header-box\">\n                  <div class=\"sk-name-c\" />\n                  <div class=\"sk-sub-c\" />\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"sk-rule\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n              </template>\n\n              <template v-else-if=\"tmpl.name === 'minimal'\">\n                <div class=\"sk-name\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-thin-rule\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n              </template>\n\n              <template v-else-if=\"tmpl.name === 'executive'\">\n                <div class=\"sk-navy-block\">\n                  <div class=\"sk-name-white\" />\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"sk-rule\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n              </template>\n\n              <template v-else-if=\"tmpl.name === 'creative'\">\n                <div class=\"sk-sidebar\">\n                  <div class=\"sk-side-name\" />\n                  <div class=\"sk-side-lines\" />\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"sk-main\">\n                  <div class=\"sk-name\" />\n                  <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n                </div>\n              </template>\n\n              <template v-else-if=\"tmpl.name === 'resignation-professional'\">\n                <div class=\"sk-sender\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-date\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-recipient\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n              </template>\n\n              <template v-else-if=\"tmpl.name === 'resignation-brief'\">\n                <div class=\"sk-name-c\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-thin-rule\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n              </template>\n            </div>\n\n            <span class=\"ts-card-name\">{{ tmpl.displayName }}</span>\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </template>\n  </UPopover>\n</template>\n\n<script setup lang=\"ts\">\nimport { ref, computed } from 'vue'\nimport { useTemplate } from '~/composables/useTemplate'\nimport { useDocumentType } from '~/composables/useDocumentType'\n\nconst { activeTemplate, setActiveTemplate, getTemplatesForDocumentType, currentTemplateMetadata } = useTemplate()\nconst { activeDocumentType } = useDocumentType()\n\nconst isOpen = ref(false)\n\nconst templates = computed(() => getTemplatesForDocumentType(activeDocumentType.value))\n\nfunction select(name: string) {\n  setActiveTemplate(name)\n  isOpen.value = false\n}\n</script>\n\n<style scoped>\n/* \u2500\u2500 Trigger \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n\n.ts-trigger {\n  gap: 5px;\n}\n\n.ts-icon {\n  width: 13px;\n  height: 13px;\n  opacity: 0.75;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.ts-chevron {\n  width: 11px;\n  height: 11px;\n  opacity: 0.55;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Panel \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n\n.ts-panel {\n  padding: 12px;\n  min-width: 288px;\n}\n\n.ts-heading {\n  font-size: 10px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  letter-spacing: 0.06em;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  color: #9ca3af;\n  margin: 0 0 10px 0;\n}\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Card grid \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n\n.ts-grid {\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);\n  gap: 8px;\n}\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Individual card \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n\n.ts-card {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 6px;\n  padding: 7px;\n  border: 2px solid #e5e7eb;\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  background: #fff;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  transition: border-color 0.12s ease, box-shadow 0.12s ease;\n  text-align: center;\n}\n\n.ts-card:hover {\n  border-color: #9ca3af;\n  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);\n}\n\n.ts-card--active {\n  border-color: #0f6fec;\n  box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #0f6fec;\n}\n\n.ts-card-name {\n  font-size: 10px;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  color: #4b5563;\n  line-height: 1;\n}\n\n.ts-card--active .ts-card-name {\n  color: #0f6fec;\n  font-weight: 600;\n}\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Sketch container \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n\n.ts-sketch {\n  width: 72px;\n  height: 88px;\n  border-radius: 3px;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  position: relative;\n  background: #fff;\n  border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n/* \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n   SHARED SKETCH PRIMITIVES\n   All sketch child elements use position: absolute unless noted otherwise.\n   \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 */\n\n/* Name block \u2013 prominent dark bar */\n.sk-name {\n  position: absolute;\n  border-radius: 1px;\n  background: #374151;\n}\n\n/* Sub-line \u2013 muted smaller bar */\n.sk-sub {\n  position: absolute;\n  border-radius: 1px;\n  background: #9ca3af;\n}\n\n/* Horizontal rule */\n.sk-rule {\n  position: absolute;\n  height: 1px;\n  background: #9ca3af;\n}\n\n/* Thin hairline rule (minimal template) */\n.sk-thin-rule {\n  position: absolute;\n  height: 1px;\n  background: #e5e7eb;\n}\n\n/* Text lines block \u2013 uses multi-gradient bg to simulate several lines of text */\n.sk-lines {\n  position: absolute;\n  background-repeat: no-repeat;\n  background-image:\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%);\n  background-size:\n    100% 2px,\n    78% 2px,\n    94% 2px,\n    65% 2px,\n    88% 2px;\n  background-position:\n    0 0,\n    0 8px,\n    0 16px,\n    0 24px,\n    0 32px;\n}\n\n/* \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n   MODERN  \u2013 blue left accent bar, clean single-column\n   \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 */\n\n.sketch-modern .sk-bar {\n  position: absolute;\n  left: 0;\n  top: 0;\n  bottom: 0;\n  width: 4px;\n  background: #0f6fec;\n}\n\n.sketch-modern .sk-name {\n  left: 10px;\n  right: 6px;\n  top: 8px;\n  height: 5px;\n}\n\n.sketch-modern .sk-sub {\n  left: 10px;\n  top: 18px;\n  width: 40%;\n  height: 2px;\n}\n\n.sketch-modern .sk-lines {\n  left: 10px;\n  right: 6px;\n  top: 28px;\n}\n\n/* \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n   CLASSIC  \u2013 outer border, centered header, horizontal divider\n   \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 */\n\n.sketch-classic {\n  border: 2px solid #9ca3af !important;\n}\n\n.sk-header-box {\n  position: absolute;\n  left: 0;\n  right: 0;\n  top: 0;\n  height: 26px;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  gap: 4px;\n  background: #f9fafb;\n}\n\n.sk-name-c {\n  width: 55%;\n  height: 4px;\n  background: #374151;\n  border-radius: 1px;\n}\n\n.sk-sub-c {\n  width: 35%;\n  height: 2px;\n  background: #9ca3af;\n  border-radius: 1px;\n}\n\n.sketch-classic .sk-rule {\n  left: 8px;\n  right: 8px;\n  top: 28px;\n}\n\n.sketch-classic .sk-lines {\n  left: 8px;\n  right: 8px;\n  top: 35px;\n}\n\n/* \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n   MINIMAL  \u2013 lots of whitespace, sparse lines\n   \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 */\n\n.sketch-minimal .sk-name {\n  left: 12px;\n  right: 12px;\n  top: 12px;\n  height: 4px;\n  background: #4b5563;\n}\n\n.sketch-minimal .sk-thin-rule {\n  left: 12px;\n  right: 12px;\n  top: 22px;\n}\n\n.sketch-minimal .sk-lines {\n  left: 12px;\n  right: 12px;\n  top: 34px;\n  background-image:\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%);\n  background-size:\n    100% 2px,\n    75% 2px,\n    90% 2px;\n  background-position:\n    0 0,\n    0 12px,\n    0 24px;\n}\n\n/* \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n   EXECUTIVE  \u2013 solid navy header block, bold white name, horizontal rule\n   \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 */\n\n.sk-navy-block {\n  position: absolute;\n  left: 0;\n  right: 0;\n  top: 0;\n  height: 24px;\n  background: #1a2744;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  padding: 0 6px;\n  -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;\n  print-color-adjust: exact;\n}\n\n.sk-name-white {\n  height: 4px;\n  width: 58%;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88);\n  border-radius: 1px;\n}\n\n.sketch-executive .sk-rule {\n  left: 6px;\n  right: 6px;\n  top: 30px;\n  background: #1a2744;\n  height: 2px;\n}\n\n.sketch-executive .sk-lines {\n  left: 6px;\n  right: 6px;\n  top: 38px;\n}\n\n/* \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n   CREATIVE  \u2013 purple sidebar + white content column\n   \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 */\n\n.sketch-creative {\n  display: flex;\n}\n\n.sk-sidebar {\n  position: absolute;\n  left: 0;\n  top: 0;\n  bottom: 0;\n  width: 22px;\n  background: #5e60ce;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  padding: 6px 3px;\n  gap: 4px;\n  -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;\n  print-color-adjust: exact;\n}\n\n.sk-side-name {\n  height: 3px;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);\n  border-radius: 1px;\n}\n\n.sk-side-lines {\n  flex: 1;\n  background-image:\n    linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 0, rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 100%),\n    linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 0, rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 100%),\n    linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 0, rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 100%);\n  background-size: 100% 2px, 80% 2px, 100% 2px;\n  background-position: 0 0, 0 8px, 0 16px;\n  background-repeat: no-repeat;\n}\n\n.sk-main {\n  position: absolute;\n  left: 26px;\n  right: 4px;\n  top: 0;\n  bottom: 0;\n}\n\n.sketch-creative .sk-name {\n  left: 0;\n  right: 0;\n  top: 8px;\n  height: 4px;\n}\n\n.sketch-creative .sk-lines {\n  left: 0;\n  right: 0;\n  top: 20px;\n}\n\n/* \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n   RESIGNATION-PROFESSIONAL  \u2013 letterhead with sender + date row\n   \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 */\n\n/* Sender name top-left */\n.sk-sender {\n  position: absolute;\n  left: 6px;\n  top: 7px;\n  width: 38%;\n  height: 3px;\n  background: #374151;\n  border-radius: 1px;\n}\n\n/* Date top-right */\n.sk-date {\n  position: absolute;\n  right: 6px;\n  top: 7px;\n  width: 22%;\n  height: 3px;\n  background: #9ca3af;\n  border-radius: 1px;\n}\n\n/* Recipient block \u2013 3 stacked lines slightly indented */\n.sk-recipient {\n  position: absolute;\n  left: 6px;\n  right: 6px;\n  top: 18px;\n  height: 14px;\n  background-image:\n    linear-gradient(#6b7280 0, #6b7280 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#6b7280 0, #6b7280 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#6b7280 0, #6b7280 100%);\n  background-size: 50% 2px, 42% 2px, 36% 2px;\n  background-position: 0 0, 0 6px, 0 12px;\n  background-repeat: no-repeat;\n}\n\n.sketch-resignation-professional .sk-lines {\n  left: 6px;\n  right: 6px;\n  top: 40px;\n  background-image:\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%);\n  background-size: 100% 2px, 82% 2px, 96% 2px, 70% 2px;\n  background-position: 0 0, 0 8px, 0 16px, 0 24px;\n}\n\n/* \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n   RESIGNATION-BRIEF  \u2013 compact, centered, minimal\n   \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 */\n\n.sketch-resignation-brief .sk-name-c {\n  position: absolute;\n  left: 50%;\n  transform: translateX(-50%);\n  top: 10px;\n  width: 50%;\n  height: 4px;\n  background: #374151;\n  border-radius: 1px;\n}\n\n.sketch-resignation-brief .sk-thin-rule {\n  left: 15%;\n  right: 15%;\n  top: 20px;\n}\n\n.sketch-resignation-brief .sk-lines {\n  left: 8px;\n  right: 8px;\n  top: 30px;\n  background-image:\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%);\n  background-size: 100% 2px, 75% 2px, 90% 2px, 60% 2px;\n  background-position: 0 0, 0 8px, 0 16px, 0 24px;\n}\n</style>\n"
}
▶ VIEW RAW DATA 
{
  "content": {
    "type": "tool_use",
    "id": "toolu_01Ne2nwmQJcsE9aXoUEea25j",
    "name": "Write",
    "input": {
      "file_path": "/home/gem/project/components/TemplateSelector.vue",
      "content": "<template>\n  <UPopover v-model:open=\"isOpen\" :popper=\"{ placement: 'bottom-end' }\">\n    <!-- Trigger button -->\n    <UButton variant=\"outline\" size=\"xs\" class=\"ts-trigger\">\n      <UIcon name=\"i-lucide-layout-template\" class=\"ts-icon\" />\n      {{ currentTemplateMetadata?.displayName ?? 'Template' }}\n      <UIcon name=\"i-lucide-chevron-down\" class=\"ts-chevron\" />\n    </UButton>\n\n    <template #content>\n      <div class=\"ts-panel\">\n        <p class=\"ts-heading\">Choose template</p>\n        <div class=\"ts-grid\">\n          <button\n            v-for=\"tmpl in templates\"\n            :key=\"tmpl.name\"\n            class=\"ts-card\"\n            :class=\"{ 'ts-card--active': tmpl.name === activeTemplate }\"\n            :title=\"tmpl.description\"\n            @click=\"select(tmpl.name)\"\n          >\n            <!-- CSS layout sketch -->\n            <div class=\"ts-sketch\" :class=\"`sketch-${tmpl.name}`\">\n              <template v-if=\"tmpl.name === 'modern'\">\n                <div class=\"sk-bar\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-name\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-sub\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n              </template>\n\n              <template v-else-if=\"tmpl.name === 'classic'\">\n                <div class=\"sk-header-box\">\n                  <div class=\"sk-name-c\" />\n                  <div class=\"sk-sub-c\" />\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"sk-rule\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n              </template>\n\n              <template v-else-if=\"tmpl.name === 'minimal'\">\n                <div class=\"sk-name\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-thin-rule\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n              </template>\n\n              <template v-else-if=\"tmpl.name === 'executive'\">\n                <div class=\"sk-navy-block\">\n                  <div class=\"sk-name-white\" />\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"sk-rule\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n              </template>\n\n              <template v-else-if=\"tmpl.name === 'creative'\">\n                <div class=\"sk-sidebar\">\n                  <div class=\"sk-side-name\" />\n                  <div class=\"sk-side-lines\" />\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"sk-main\">\n                  <div class=\"sk-name\" />\n                  <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n                </div>\n              </template>\n\n              <template v-else-if=\"tmpl.name === 'resignation-professional'\">\n                <div class=\"sk-sender\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-date\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-recipient\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n              </template>\n\n              <template v-else-if=\"tmpl.name === 'resignation-brief'\">\n                <div class=\"sk-name-c\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-thin-rule\" />\n                <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n              </template>\n            </div>\n\n            <span class=\"ts-card-name\">{{ tmpl.displayName }}</span>\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </template>\n  </UPopover>\n</template>\n\n<script setup lang=\"ts\">\nimport { ref, computed } from 'vue'\nimport { useTemplate } from '~/composables/useTemplate'\nimport { useDocumentType } from '~/composables/useDocumentType'\n\nconst { activeTemplate, setActiveTemplate, getTemplatesForDocumentType, currentTemplateMetadata } = useTemplate()\nconst { activeDocumentType } = useDocumentType()\n\nconst isOpen = ref(false)\n\nconst templates = computed(() => getTemplatesForDocumentType(activeDocumentType.value))\n\nfunction select(name: string) {\n  setActiveTemplate(name)\n  isOpen.value = false\n}\n</script>\n\n<style scoped>\n/* \u2500\u2500 Trigger \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n\n.ts-trigger {\n  gap: 5px;\n}\n\n.ts-icon {\n  width: 13px;\n  height: 13px;\n  opacity: 0.75;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.ts-chevron {\n  width: 11px;\n  height: 11px;\n  opacity: 0.55;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Panel \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n\n.ts-panel {\n  padding: 12px;\n  min-width: 288px;\n}\n\n.ts-heading {\n  font-size: 10px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  letter-spacing: 0.06em;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  color: #9ca3af;\n  margin: 0 0 10px 0;\n}\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Card grid \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n\n.ts-grid {\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);\n  gap: 8px;\n}\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Individual card \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n\n.ts-card {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 6px;\n  padding: 7px;\n  border: 2px solid #e5e7eb;\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  background: #fff;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  transition: border-color 0.12s ease, box-shadow 0.12s ease;\n  text-align: center;\n}\n\n.ts-card:hover {\n  border-color: #9ca3af;\n  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);\n}\n\n.ts-card--active {\n  border-color: #0f6fec;\n  box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #0f6fec;\n}\n\n.ts-card-name {\n  font-size: 10px;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  color: #4b5563;\n  line-height: 1;\n}\n\n.ts-card--active .ts-card-name {\n  color: #0f6fec;\n  font-weight: 600;\n}\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Sketch container \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n\n.ts-sketch {\n  width: 72px;\n  height: 88px;\n  border-radius: 3px;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  position: relative;\n  background: #fff;\n  border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n/* \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n   SHARED SKETCH PRIMITIVES\n   All sketch child elements use position: absolute unless noted otherwise.\n   \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 */\n\n/* Name block \u2013 prominent dark bar */\n.sk-name {\n  position: absolute;\n  border-radius: 1px;\n  background: #374151;\n}\n\n/* Sub-line \u2013 muted smaller bar */\n.sk-sub {\n  position: absolute;\n  border-radius: 1px;\n  background: #9ca3af;\n}\n\n/* Horizontal rule */\n.sk-rule {\n  position: absolute;\n  height: 1px;\n  background: #9ca3af;\n}\n\n/* Thin hairline rule (minimal template) */\n.sk-thin-rule {\n  position: absolute;\n  height: 1px;\n  background: #e5e7eb;\n}\n\n/* Text lines block \u2013 uses multi-gradient bg to simulate several lines of text */\n.sk-lines {\n  position: absolute;\n  background-repeat: no-repeat;\n  background-image:\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%);\n  background-size:\n    100% 2px,\n    78% 2px,\n    94% 2px,\n    65% 2px,\n    88% 2px;\n  background-position:\n    0 0,\n    0 8px,\n    0 16px,\n    0 24px,\n    0 32px;\n}\n\n/* \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n   MODERN  \u2013 blue left accent bar, clean single-column\n   \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 */\n\n.sketch-modern .sk-bar {\n  position: absolute;\n  left: 0;\n  top: 0;\n  bottom: 0;\n  width: 4px;\n  background: #0f6fec;\n}\n\n.sketch-modern .sk-name {\n  left: 10px;\n  right: 6px;\n  top: 8px;\n  height: 5px;\n}\n\n.sketch-modern .sk-sub {\n  left: 10px;\n  top: 18px;\n  width: 40%;\n  height: 2px;\n}\n\n.sketch-modern .sk-lines {\n  left: 10px;\n  right: 6px;\n  top: 28px;\n}\n\n/* \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n   CLASSIC  \u2013 outer border, centered header, horizontal divider\n   \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 */\n\n.sketch-classic {\n  border: 2px solid #9ca3af !important;\n}\n\n.sk-header-box {\n  position: absolute;\n  left: 0;\n  right: 0;\n  top: 0;\n  height: 26px;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  gap: 4px;\n  background: #f9fafb;\n}\n\n.sk-name-c {\n  width: 55%;\n  height: 4px;\n  background: #374151;\n  border-radius: 1px;\n}\n\n.sk-sub-c {\n  width: 35%;\n  height: 2px;\n  background: #9ca3af;\n  border-radius: 1px;\n}\n\n.sketch-classic .sk-rule {\n  left: 8px;\n  right: 8px;\n  top: 28px;\n}\n\n.sketch-classic .sk-lines {\n  left: 8px;\n  right: 8px;\n  top: 35px;\n}\n\n/* \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n   MINIMAL  \u2013 lots of whitespace, sparse lines\n   \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 */\n\n.sketch-minimal .sk-name {\n  left: 12px;\n  right: 12px;\n  top: 12px;\n  height: 4px;\n  background: #4b5563;\n}\n\n.sketch-minimal .sk-thin-rule {\n  left: 12px;\n  right: 12px;\n  top: 22px;\n}\n\n.sketch-minimal .sk-lines {\n  left: 12px;\n  right: 12px;\n  top: 34px;\n  background-image:\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%);\n  background-size:\n    100% 2px,\n    75% 2px,\n    90% 2px;\n  background-position:\n    0 0,\n    0 12px,\n    0 24px;\n}\n\n/* \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n   EXECUTIVE  \u2013 solid navy header block, bold white name, horizontal rule\n   \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 */\n\n.sk-navy-block {\n  position: absolute;\n  left: 0;\n  right: 0;\n  top: 0;\n  height: 24px;\n  background: #1a2744;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  padding: 0 6px;\n  -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;\n  print-color-adjust: exact;\n}\n\n.sk-name-white {\n  height: 4px;\n  width: 58%;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88);\n  border-radius: 1px;\n}\n\n.sketch-executive .sk-rule {\n  left: 6px;\n  right: 6px;\n  top: 30px;\n  background: #1a2744;\n  height: 2px;\n}\n\n.sketch-executive .sk-lines {\n  left: 6px;\n  right: 6px;\n  top: 38px;\n}\n\n/* \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n   CREATIVE  \u2013 purple sidebar + white content column\n   \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 */\n\n.sketch-creative {\n  display: flex;\n}\n\n.sk-sidebar {\n  position: absolute;\n  left: 0;\n  top: 0;\n  bottom: 0;\n  width: 22px;\n  background: #5e60ce;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  padding: 6px 3px;\n  gap: 4px;\n  -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;\n  print-color-adjust: exact;\n}\n\n.sk-side-name {\n  height: 3px;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);\n  border-radius: 1px;\n}\n\n.sk-side-lines {\n  flex: 1;\n  background-image:\n    linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 0, rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 100%),\n    linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 0, rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 100%),\n    linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 0, rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 100%);\n  background-size: 100% 2px, 80% 2px, 100% 2px;\n  background-position: 0 0, 0 8px, 0 16px;\n  background-repeat: no-repeat;\n}\n\n.sk-main {\n  position: absolute;\n  left: 26px;\n  right: 4px;\n  top: 0;\n  bottom: 0;\n}\n\n.sketch-creative .sk-name {\n  left: 0;\n  right: 0;\n  top: 8px;\n  height: 4px;\n}\n\n.sketch-creative .sk-lines {\n  left: 0;\n  right: 0;\n  top: 20px;\n}\n\n/* \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n   RESIGNATION-PROFESSIONAL  \u2013 letterhead with sender + date row\n   \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 */\n\n/* Sender name top-left */\n.sk-sender {\n  position: absolute;\n  left: 6px;\n  top: 7px;\n  width: 38%;\n  height: 3px;\n  background: #374151;\n  border-radius: 1px;\n}\n\n/* Date top-right */\n.sk-date {\n  position: absolute;\n  right: 6px;\n  top: 7px;\n  width: 22%;\n  height: 3px;\n  background: #9ca3af;\n  border-radius: 1px;\n}\n\n/* Recipient block \u2013 3 stacked lines slightly indented */\n.sk-recipient {\n  position: absolute;\n  left: 6px;\n  right: 6px;\n  top: 18px;\n  height: 14px;\n  background-image:\n    linear-gradient(#6b7280 0, #6b7280 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#6b7280 0, #6b7280 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#6b7280 0, #6b7280 100%);\n  background-size: 50% 2px, 42% 2px, 36% 2px;\n  background-position: 0 0, 0 6px, 0 12px;\n  background-repeat: no-repeat;\n}\n\n.sketch-resignation-professional .sk-lines {\n  left: 6px;\n  right: 6px;\n  top: 40px;\n  background-image:\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%);\n  background-size: 100% 2px, 82% 2px, 96% 2px, 70% 2px;\n  background-position: 0 0, 0 8px, 0 16px, 0 24px;\n}\n\n/* \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n   RESIGNATION-BRIEF  \u2013 compact, centered, minimal\n   \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 */\n\n.sketch-resignation-brief .sk-name-c {\n  position: absolute;\n  left: 50%;\n  transform: translateX(-50%);\n  top: 10px;\n  width: 50%;\n  height: 4px;\n  background: #374151;\n  border-radius: 1px;\n}\n\n.sketch-resignation-brief .sk-thin-rule {\n  left: 15%;\n  right: 15%;\n  top: 20px;\n}\n\n.sketch-resignation-brief .sk-lines {\n  left: 8px;\n  right: 8px;\n  top: 30px;\n  background-image:\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%);\n  background-size: 100% 2px, 75% 2px, 90% 2px, 60% 2px;\n  background-position: 0 0, 0 8px, 0 16px, 0 24px;\n}\n</style>\n"
    },

    48→import { computed } from 'vue'
    49→import { useTemplate } from '~/composables/useTemplate'
    50→import { useDocumentType } from '~/composables/useDocumentType'
    51→
    52→const { activeTemplate, setActiveTemplate, getTemplatesForDocumentType } = useTemplate()
    53→const { activeDocumentType, setActiveDocumentType, getAvailableDocumentTypes } = useDocumentType()
    54→
    55→// Document type options (static — registry doesn't change at runtime)
    56→const documentTypeOptions = getAvailableDocumentTypes().map(d => ({ label: d.displayName, value: d.name }))
    57→

    60→  getTemplatesForDocumentType(activeDocumentType.value).map(m => ({ label: m.displayName, value: m.name })),

    66→})
    67→

    69→  get: () => activeTemplate.value,
    70→  set: (val: string) => setActiveTemplate(val),

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #79
The popover isn't showing. The viewport might be too small. Let me check the layout issue - the buttons appear to be in the top-left area, and the header layout seems broken. The `UContainer` and flexbox `justify-between` should center the title and put the controls on the right. Looking at the screenshot, it seems the header is showing but in a compact form in the top-left corner. This might be because the viewport is too narrow. Let me resize the viewport to at least 1200px wide. Also, looking more carefully at the screenshot, the "Type" label, "Cover Letter" dropdown, "Modern" button, and "Export PDF" button are all showing near the top-left. The "OhMyDoc" title is at the very top-left too. I'll widen the browser window and check the console to see if there are any errors preventing the popover from opening.

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #84
No errors. The popover might not be opening because of how UPopover works in @nuxt/ui v4. Let me check if there's a different API. In @nuxt/ui v4, `UPopover` might use `v-model:open` or might need a `#trigger` slot rather than the default slot. Looking at the snapshot again, the button shows `haspopup="dialog"` which means the popover is associated, it just might not be visible. Let me try to examine the page more carefully. Actually, looking at the screenshot, the button IS there at the top but the popover might be opening off-screen or behind something. The accessibility tree shows all the buttons are rendering correctly—the Type dropdown, Modern template selector, and Export PDF button are all there—but the popover isn't appearing when I click the template selector, so there's likely an issue with how UPopover is configured in v4. I need to verify the correct slot names for UPopover in @nuxt/ui v4, since the slot structure might have changed from v3 where it used `#panel` for the content.

import theme from "#build/ui/popover";
import { useAppConfig } from "#imports";
const slots = defineSlots();
  <Component.Root v-slot="{ open }" v-bind="rootProps">
    <Component.Trigger v-if="!!slots.default || !!reference" as-child :reference="reference" :class="props.class">
      <slot :open="open" />
    <Component.Anchor v-if="'Anchor' in Component && !!slots.anchor" as-child>
      <slot name="anchor" />
      <Component.Content v-bind="contentProps" :class="ui.content({ class: [!slots.default && props.class, props.ui?.content] })" v-on="contentEvents">
        <slot name="content" />

OK, so the slot name IS `#content` in @nuxt/ui v4. And the trigger is the default slot. Let me check why the popover isn't opening. Let me look at the issue more carefully. Looking at the screenshot, the page seems to be very narrow (the header elements are all in the top-left), and the popover might be rendering but off-screen. Let me try to evaluate some JavaScript to check what's happening. Actually wait - looking at the UPopover source, the trigger is in the default `<slot>`, not a `#trigger` slot. Let me re-examine my TemplateSelector code. In my component, I have: I'm setting up the popover with the trigger button in the default slot and the content in a named slot, but I'm wondering if `v-model:open` is actually supported in @nuxt/ui v4 since it uses Reka UI internally, or if the binding works differently.

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #92
So UPopover accepts an `open` prop (not `v-model:open`) and emits `update:open`. The `v-model:open` should work (it's the shorthand for `:open` + `@update:open`). Let me check the actual issue. Looking at this more carefully: 1. The prop is `open` (not `modelValue`) 2. The emit is `update:open` 3. So `v-model:open` should work for two-way binding But wait - maybe the issue is that `v-model:open` is not being recognized because the component doesn't expose `onUpdate:open`. I think the simplest approach is to remove the `v-model:open` binding entirely and let the popover manage its own open state, since it auto-closes when clicking outside anyway. The `select(name)` function can stay as-is to handle card clicks, but I don't need to manually control the popover's open state. Actually, wait—clicking a card inside the popover won't trigger the outside-click close behavior since it's clicking within the popover content itself. I need to explicitly close it when a card is selected. Let me reconsider the UPopover API: the `:open` prop and `@update:open` event should work together, or I could try a different approach entirely. But first, I should check if the popover is even rendering visually—it might be opening off-screen or hidden by CSS overflow issues rather than a binding problem. I'll add a console check to verify what's happening with the popover state when I interact with it.

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #96
The popover content isn't being rendered. The `.ts-panel` isn't there yet. This confirms the popover isn't opening when clicking the button. Let me check if the popover was removed from the DOM when I last inspected or if the click is somehow not being registered. Actually, I'm wondering if the `v-model:open` syntax is causing an issue in Vue 3 with this component. Let me look at the PopoverRoot and understand the open prop more carefully. Actually wait - looking at the UPopover source again: ``` const emits = defineEmits(["close:prevent", "update:open"]); ``` And `open` is a prop. So `v-model:open` should work fine. But I'm realizing the real issue might be with the `as-child` attribute on PopoverTrigger — if UButton doesn't properly forward the trigger's event handlers, the popover won't open when clicked. Let me try a different approach without `v-model:open` and instead use a simple ref-based state with manual event handling to see if that resolves the issue. ``` js const isOpen = ref(false); ``` Then bind it directly to the popover and handle the update event manually. Actually, I'm wondering if the real problem is that UButton isn't properly forwarding the click event as a trigger for the popover—maybe I need to use a plain button element to test whether it's a component-specific issue.

But I'm realizing the real issue might be with the `as-child` attribute on PopoverTrigger \u2014 if UButton doesn't properly forward the trigger's event handlers, the popover won't open when clicked.\n\nLet me try a different approach without `v-model:open` and instead use a simple ref-based state with manual event handling to see if that resolves the issue.\n\n```\n\njs\nconst isOpen = ref(false);\n```\n\nThen bind it directly to the popover and handle the update event manually. mcp__chrome_devtools__evaluate_script TOOL CALL 
{
  "function": "() => {\n  // Check what buttons exist and their attributes\n  const buttons = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button'))\n  return buttons.map(b => ({\n    text: b.textContent?.trim().substring(0, 30),\n    ariaHasPopup: b.getAttribute('aria-haspopup'),\n    ariaExpanded: b.getAttribute('aria-expanded'),\n    type: b.type\n  }))\n}"
}

    },

      "type": "direct"
    }
  }
}

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #100
mcp__chrome_devtools__evaluate_script TOOL CALL 
{
  "function": "() => {\n  // Click the Modern button and check aria-expanded after\n  const btn = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b => b.textContent?.includes('Modern'))\n  if (btn) {\n    btn.click()\n    return { clicked: true, expanded: btn.getAttribute('aria-expanded') }\n  }\n  return { clicked: false }\n}"
}
▶ VIEW RAW DATA

    "type": "tool_use",
    "id": "toolu_012wRCurbhfXQJcUERMrK5iy",
    "name": "mcp__chrome_devtools__evaluate_script",
    "input": {
      "function": "() => {\n  // Click the Modern button and check aria-expanded after\n  const btn = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b => b.textContent?.includes('Modern'))\n  if (btn) {\n    btn.click()\n    return { clicked: true, expanded: btn.getAttribute('aria-expanded') }\n  }\n  return { clicked: false }\n}"
    },
    "caller": {
      "type": "direct"
    }
  }
}

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #102
The click happened but `aria-expanded` is still `false`. This means the popover is not toggling when the button is clicked. Let me check what's going on. Looking at UPopover in @nuxt/ui v4, the trigger is wrapped with `Component.Trigger as-child`. This means the Popover.Trigger component should delegate click handling to the slotted button. But if the button still has `aria-expanded="false"` after clicking, the popover trigger mechanism isn't working. Wait - could the issue be that I'm using `v-model:open` which is controlling the open state from outside? When I control `open` externally with a ref that starts as `false`, maybe the popover isn't responding to clicks because the external `open` prop is overriding the internal toggle behavior. In controlled mode, the component won't toggle itself on click—it only opens or closes based on the `open` prop value. So when I click the trigger, it should emit `update:open` with the new value, which `v-model:open` would handle by updating `isOpen`. But the button click might not be triggering that event in the first place. I'm wondering if this could be an issue with how Reka UI's `as-child` pattern works with Vue components like `UButton`—it might not be forwarding events correctly. Let me try removing `as-child` by using a `reference` prop instead, or just swap in a plain `<button>` element to see if that's the bottleneck. Actually, I'm suspecting the real problem might be with `v-model:open` itself—if the popover treats a controlled `false` value as "always closed," it could be blocking the reactive updates. Maybe I should drop the v-model binding entirely and let the popover manage its own open state, or use `defaultOpen` instead. simplest fix: instead of controlling the popover's open state to close it after selection, I can: 1. Remove `v-model:open="isOpen"` 2. Just let the popover manage its own open state 3. When a card is clicked, call `select(name)` and then find a way to close the popover But without controlled state, how do I close the popover when a card is clicked? One option: Wrap the select function in a way that also closes the popover. I could use the `@click.native` or a custom event. Actually, the best approach for @nuxt/ui UPopover without controlled state: the popover should close when clicking outside. But clicking inside won't close it. Let me try a different approach: use `UModal` instead of `UPopover`, or use a dropdown panel approach. Actually, I think the real issue might be that UButton has its own internal click handlers that could be conflicting with the popover's trigger mechanism. Maybe I should try wrapping the trigger with a plain element instead and styling it manually, or check if there's a standard pattern in the @nuxt/ui examples for using UButton as a popover trigger. Looking at the UPopover component structure, it seems like the trigger slot should work with `as-child` to avoid nested button elements. to be composable. But maybe there's something else going on—let me check if UPopover requires a specific context or if there's a Portal component involved. I should look at the console output after clicking to see what's actually happening.

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #105
No errors in console. Let me check how the existing USelectMenu works in this app to understand the correct pattern for other overlay components. Actually, let me check if the issue is that `v-model:open` with an initial value of `false` is treated as a "controlled" state by Reka UI, and the Popover Root doesn't toggle itself because it's controlled externally. The fix might be to just not provide `v-model:open` (let it be uncontrolled), and instead use a different approach to close the popover after selection. One clean approach: use `USelectMenu` internally but customize its appearance with template slots to show the cards. But that might be complex. Another approach is to remove `v-model:open` entirely and let the popover manage its own state, then close it after a card is clicked either through a Nuxt UI event or by programmatically triggering an outside click. The cleanest solution would be to use a ref bound directly to the UPopover component itself, since it should expose a `close()` method or similar. Let me look more carefully at what methods UPopover actually exposes.

USERMESSAGE #107
✓ TOOL RESULT
SUCCESS 
  closeDelay: { type: Number, required: false, default: 0 }
const emits = defineEmits(["close:prevent", "update:open"]);
const pick = props.mode === "hover" ? reactivePick(props, "defaultOpen", "open", "openDelay", "closeDelay") : reactivePick(props, "defaultOpen", "open", "modal");
        emits("close:prevent");
▶ VIEW RAW DATA 
{
  "content": {
    "tool_use_id": "toolu_017mo3iLo7che9NuxfZPPtGm",
    "type": "tool_result",
    "content": "  closeDelay: { type: Number, required: false, default: 0 }\nconst emits = defineEmits([\"close:prevent\", \"update:open\"]);\nconst pick = props.mode === \"hover\" ? reactivePick(props, \"defaultOpen\", \"open\", \"openDelay\", \"closeDelay\") : reactivePick(props, \"defaultOpen\", \"open\", \"modal\");\n        emits(\"close:prevent\");",
    "is_error": false
  }
}
ASSISTANTMESSAGE #108
UPopover doesn't expose any `close()` method. The way to close it is through `v-model:open`. But the issue is that `v-model:open` with an initial value of `false` might not be working correctly. Let me think about this differently. Maybe the issue is that `v-model:open` IS working but the initial value of `ref(false)` with Reka UI's controlled mode might prevent the popover from opening on click because Reka UI needs to receive an `update:open` event and then the parent updates the `open` prop. Actually, I wonder if the problem is simpler: Maybe UPopover's internal trigger click listener isn't being triggered because I'm clicking programmatically via JS rather than through real user interaction. I tested clicking the button through the accessibility tree, and it got focus but the popover still didn't expand. Let me try ditching the controlled mode approach entirely and use a click handler on the backdrop instead. The real issue is probably that Reka UI's controlled `open` prop requires the parent to handle the `update:open` event, but there might be a reactivity or timing problem preventing the popover from actually opening. I'll try using `defaultOpen` instead or just let the component manage its own state, then close it manually when needed by clicking the document body or using a click handler with `@click.stop` on the popover content. Looking at the actual component structure, I'm checking if the UButton trigger is correctly placed as the default slot and the content panel is in the `#content` slot, which looks right. The issue might be with the `:popper` configuration or something else with the Reka UI setup.

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #111
OK, so in @nuxt/ui v4 UPopover doesn't have a `popper` prop — it has a `content` prop that accepts an object with `side`, `sideOffset`, etc. The `:popper="{ placement: 'bottom-end' }"` prop I used is probably being ignored (passed as an attribute), but shouldn't break things. Let me fix the positioning prop and also check if there's an issue with the controlled mode. Actually, wait - let me re-read the UPopover source more carefully: ```js const pick = props.mode === "hover" ? reactivePick(props, "defaultOpen", "open", "openDelay", "closeDelay") : reactivePick(props, "defaultOpen", "open", "modal"); ``` So `open` is only picked when mode is "click" (not hover). It's passed to `Component.Root`, which is Reka UI's `PopoverRoot`. When `open` is provided as a controlled prop, the component should render the trigger with click handlers, emit `update:open(true)` when clicked, and the parent updates `open` to `true` to show the content. The issue might be a timing problem with `v-model:open` in the SSR/hydration context. I'm considering a few alternatives: using an uncontrolled `UPopover` and manually triggering closure with an Escape key event or click-outside simulation, or building a completely custom dropdown component for full control. Let me look at how `USelectMenu` is implemented in this project since it works fine as a dropdown, then decide whether to adapt that pattern or go with a custom solution. ``` Actually, I think the custom approach is cleaner—a simple toggle button with a panel that uses click-outside detection to close. Let me rebuild TemplateSelector.vue with this method instead of relying on UPopover. Before I rewrite everything though, let me check if the issue is environmental. The browser window might be too small or the popover might be rendering off-screen. Let me do a fresh page load and see what's actually happening. ``` Looking at the screenshots, I can see the "OhMyDoc" heading and below it the dropdown trigger, but I need to verify whether the popover is actually rendering or if there's a viewport constraint preventing it from appearing.
▶ VIEW RAW DATA

It's passed to `Component.Root`, which is Reka UI's `PopoverRoot`. ASSISTANTMESSAGE #114
The viewport is 1280x937, which is plenty. So the layout issue I saw in the screenshot might just be a rendering artifact. Let me try reloading the page and then click the button to see the popover. Actually wait - I see the screenshot showed the buttons at top-left stacked. But that could be because the UContainer's max-width was centering it at a large viewport. Let me take another screenshot. Also, the key issue is still: the popover isn't opening. Let me check by using the Chrome DevTools to actually click the button (not simulate via JS), take a screenshot, and see what happens. I think the real problem might be that `v-model:open` isn't properly syncing with the Popover component's internal state. Let me try removing that binding and let the Popover handle its own open/closed state instead.

The viewport is fine. The issue is with UPopover's controlled mode. Let me fix `TemplateSelector.vue` — remove `v-model:open` (let Popover manage its own state) and use the correct `content` prop for positioning:

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #118
The issue is with `v-model:open="isOpen"`. When I control the `open` state externally, the PopoverRoot from Reka UI treats it as fully controlled. The trigger click should emit `update:open(true)`, which v-model would catch and update `isOpen`. But something in the chain is failing. Instead of using UPopover's controlled mode, let me use a simpler approach: a custom dropdown implementation using Vue's `v-if` and click-outside detection. Actually, the simplest fix might be: remove `v-model:open="isOpen"` from UPopover, and to close the popover when a card is clicked, trigger a synthetic Escape key event or click outside. I'm realizing Reka UI's PopoverClose component could work, but it's getting complex. The cleanest solution is to build a custom dropdown with full control—I'll use a teleported container with click-outside detection to handle opening and closing, avoiding the UPopover controlled mode issue entirely. For the implementation, I'm creating a wrapper div with relative positioning that contains the toggle button and a conditionally rendered dropdown panel, using a click-outside directive to close it when needed. Building the dropdown structure...
▶ VIEW RAW DATA 
{
  "content": {
    "type": "thinking",
    "thinking": "The issue is with `v-model:open=\"isOpen\"`. When I control the `open` state externally, the PopoverRoot from Reka UI treats it as fully controlled. The trigger click should emit `update:open(true)`, which v-model would catch and update `isOpen`. But something in the chain is failing.\n\nInstead of using UPopover's controlled mode, let me use a simpler approach: a custom dropdown implementation using Vue's `v-if` and click-outside detection.\n\nActually, the simplest fix might be: remove `v-model:open=\"isOpen\"` from UPopover, and to close the popover when a card is clicked, trigger a synthetic Escape key event or click outside.\n\n\nI'm realizing Reka UI's PopoverClose component could work, but it's getting complex. The cleanest solution is to build a custom dropdown with full control\u2014I'll use a teleported container with click-outside detection to handle opening and closing, avoiding the UPopover controlled mode issue entirely.\n\nFor the implementation, I'm creating a wrapper div with relative positioning that contains the toggle button and a conditionally rendered dropdown panel, using a click-outside directive to close it when needed.\n\nBuilding the dropdown structure...",
